title: Annual Sports Day
description: Annual Inter-House Sports Competition featuring athletics, team sports, and cultural performances. A grand celebration of health and sportsmanship.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting
description: Quarterly Parent-Teacher interaction session. Parents can discuss their ward's academic progress, attendance and behaviour with respective teachers.

title: Science Exhibition
description: District-level Science Exhibition where students display their innovative projects and models. Open to judges, parents, and the public.

title: Annual Day Celebrations
description: Grand Annual Day with cultural performances by students — dances, dramas, skits, and prize distribution. A celebration of talent and hard work.

title: Republic Day Celebrations
description: Republic Day flag hoisting, march past, patriotic songs, and speeches by students. A proud moment celebrating our nation's democracy.

title: Children's Day Program
description: Special Children's Day celebration with fun activities, games, competitions, and entertainment organized by teachers for the students.
